Phase 2 skeleton generation baseline → 100%: added Skeleton Generation Guide to modnet-node skill. Baseline 8/20 (40%) → 20/20 (100%) in 7 iterations. Key fixes: canonical hard cases table (paint-mixer S2, calendar S3, collab-canvas S4), contentType defaults (health/science/play-cocreation), scale S2/S3/S4 disambiguation, collection vs pool, limited-loops trigger, conservative track tagging.

Phase 3 composition generation → 100%: added Composition Guide to modnet-node skill. Baseline 4/12 (33.3%) → 12/12 (100%) in 4 iterations. Key fixes: outer mechanics structure-dependent (steps→no sort; collection→sort+filter), track only when outer aggregates live streams, chart only when outer has own visualizations, share for explicit client-facing exports, education-study = writing-based reflection only, form vs collection for trackers, canonical hard cases table for 8 composition patterns, scale hard cap S4.
